title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform for agentic engineering that lets users define YAML workflows running in isolated git worktrees with any model provider. The marketplace enables one-click installation and sharing of battle-tested AI coding workflows across users.
